description: envcloak: block raw access to real .env files (Read/Edit/Write/Grep/Glob/Bash). At SessionStart it also bakes .env deny rules + an allow rule for the envcloak MCP into ~/.claude/settings.json and injects standing guidance, so the agent is steered to env_read (a masked, length-preserving view) from the first call. Example/template files (.env.example, .env.sample, .env.template, .env.dist, .env.schema) stay readable.
